title: Proudly voted best used car dealership in Mossel Bay for the second year running
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Seesig Motors is honoured to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Seesig Motors is honoured to once again be voted Best Used Car Dealership in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Seesig Motors is honoured to once again be voted Best Used Car Dealership in the Best of Mossel Bay Awards 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Winning this award for the second consecutive year is both a privilege and a reflection of the trust, loyalty, and support we continue to receive from our valued customers and the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 24 years of experience in the motor industry, Seesig Motors has built its reputation on integrity, professionalism, and a passion for helping clients find their dream vehicles.","html":"With 24 years of experience in the motor industry, Seesig Motors has built its reputation on integrity, professionalism, and a passion for helping clients find their dream vehicles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As a proud Blue-Chip Member of the Independent Dealer Association (IDA)—a title reserved for only 80 out of 750 members nationwide—our dealership upholds the highest standards of quality and service.","html":"As a proud Blue-Chip Member of the Independent Dealer Association (IDA)—a title reserved for only 80 out of 750 members nationwide—our dealership upholds the highest standards of quality and service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What sets us apart is our people. Our dedicated team works tirelessly to provide exceptional customer care, ensuring that every client drives away with confidence and satisfaction.","html":"What sets us apart is our people. Our dedicated team works tirelessly to provide exceptional customer care, ensuring that every client drives away with confidence and satisfaction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mossel Bay for once again recognising our commitment to excellence. This award belongs to our loyal customers, our hardworking team, and our supportive community. Together, we will continue raising the bar and delivering the service and trust that Seesig Motors is known for.","html":"We extend our heartfelt thanks to Mossel Bay for once again recognising our commitment to excellence. This award belongs to our loyal customers, our hardworking team, and our supportive community. Together, we will continue raising the bar and delivering the service and trust that Seesig Motors is known for."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Contact Us:"},{"type":"list","items":["Phone: 044 695 0213","Address: Louis Fourie Road, Voorbaai","Email: [email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Proudly voted best used car dealership in Mossel Bay for the second year running
